source.description: A reviewed six-panel handmade marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free open pair of scissors angled diagonally on warm off-white paper; the approved generated sheet uses four small snip sparks and raspberry handles with yellow reserved for the sparks; no hand, paper, cutout, lettering, logo, sticker outline, badge frame, decorative border, or extra tool.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one circular pivot, two crossing blade axes, two handle-loop footprints, and an open diagonal pose; wraps those guides with the complete scissors silhouette; adds the inner loops, blade edges, pivot screw, grip bands, four snip sparks, motion marks, and shadow; then inks and colors only those established shapes before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: circular pivot, two crossing blade axes, two handle-loop footprints, and open diagonal pose
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one open pair of scissors with the handle at lower left and blade tips spreading toward upper right.

final_elements.name: scissors silhouette with two blades, two rounded handle loops, and central pivot hub
final_elements.description: A bold outer contour turns the guides into a readable pair of open scissors at one locked angle.

final_elements.name: two inner handle openings, blade center bevels, round pivot screw, and two grip bands
final_elements.description: The functional inner openings and hardware complete the tool without a character face.

final_elements.name: four snip sparks, two short motion marks, white blade highlights, and violet ground shadow
final_elements.description: Exactly four small sparks, two motion ticks, planned highlights, and one shadow add comic action around the established scissors.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with raspberry, yellow, turquoise, cool-gray, and violet marker fills
final_elements.description: Visible felt-tip texture separates the handles, grip bands, blades, pivot, accents, and shadow while preserving paper highlights.

frames.visible_job: Places the circular pivot, two crossing blade axes, two rounded handle-loop footprints, and the open diagonal pose at one fixed scale.
introduces: circular pivot, two crossing blade axes, two handle-loop footprints, and open diagonal pose

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with two long blades, two rounded handle loops, and one central pivot hub while preserving the same open angle.
introduces: scissors silhouette with two blades, two rounded handle loops, and central pivot hub
requires_prior_elements: circular pivot, two crossing blade axes, two handle-loop footprints, and open diagonal pose

frames.visible_job: Adds both inner handle openings, the two blade-center bevels, the round pivot screw, and two grip bands inside the completed silhouette.
introduces: two inner handle openings, blade center bevels, round pivot screw, and two grip bands
requires_prior_elements: scissors silhouette with two blades, two rounded handle loops, and central pivot hub

frames.visible_job: Adds exactly four small snip sparks, two short motion marks, narrow blade-highlight gaps, and one violet ground-shadow shape around the established tool.
introduces: four snip sparks, two short motion marks, white blade highlights, and violet ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: scissors silhouette with two blades, two rounded handle loops, and central pivot hub
two inner handle openings, blade center bevels, round pivot screw, and two grip bands

frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the handles, grip bands, blades, pivot, sparks, motion marks, and shadow with directional marker strokes.
introduces: thick black outline with raspberry, yellow, turquoise, cool-gray, and violet marker fills
requires_prior_elements: scissors silhouette with two blades, two rounded handle loops, and central pivot hub
two inner handle openings, blade center bevels, round pivot screw, and two grip bands
four snip sparks, two short motion marks, white blade highlights, and violet ground shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established scissors silhouette, handle openings, blade bevels, pivot, grip bands, four sparks, two motion marks, marker fills, highlights, and shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established blades and handles

rejection_checks: No blade, handle loop, opening, pivot, bevel, grip band, spark, motion mark, color area, highlight, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The scissors must retain one open diagonal pose, blade angle, handle size, pivot position, scale, and crop across every frame.
Keep the tool face-free: no eyes, pupils, brows, mouth, teeth, tongue, or cheek marks.
Reject hands, paper, cutouts, lettering, logos, extra tools, sticker outlines, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, smooth digital gradients, mechanically perfect geometry, poster lighting, or clean 3D-rendered plastic and metal.
